benefits.title: Members-only discounts at events
benefits.description: Save on registration fees at ECRS events throughout the year.

benefits.title: Steer the direction of ECRS
benefits.description: Vote on Board members and issues, and/or become a Board member yourself.

benefits.title: Free subscription to ECHOES
benefits.description: Receive our newsletter and stay connected with the ECRS community.

benefits.title: Recreation and leadership training
benefits.description: Access workshops and resources to grow your skills and confidence.

benefits.title: Share in the ECRS magic and fun!
benefits.description: Be part of a warm, welcoming community built on creativity and cooperation.

benefits.title: Support the organization you love
benefits.description: Your membership directly sustains ECRS and makes everything possible.

pricingIntro: Annual membership dues are only $25 for the first person in the household, and $15 for any other person over 16 living in the household. If there is a lifetime member in a household, the annual dues are also only $15 for any other person 16 or older living in the household. You can also purchase a lifetime membership, which is $400 for an individual or $650 for a couple. Dues expire on December 31 of the year they are paid, regardless of when the payment is made.
formHeading: Choose a membership and complete the form below
formNote: If you are unable to pay online, please contact our membership secretary directly to make arrangements.
